tasks.title: T-00a-006b — Pre-commit token-cap gate (40000 tokens; extends T-00a-006)
tasks.description: [infra/ci] [T2] Hook rejects diffs >40000 tokens; comment links to 00-FOUNDATION-PRD.md §11.3
tasks.details: Type: T2-api (hook extension). Context: ~25k. Track: δ. Gap-fill per Decision #5. Cap = 40000 (NOT 18000). Hook comment MUST link to 00-FOUNDATION-PRD.md §11.3 context budget.
